title: Blizzard Devs are in tears that Gamers keep Winning
description:
A top level Senior Overwatch Dev at Activision Blizzard is very upset that gamers are analyzing data and criticizing the AAA industry, resulting in bro making one of the most pathetic posts possible. Similarly, a Marathon influencer is also mad at gamers because how dare we look at data and call out the corrupt AAA industry.
